resources.string: Submitted booking requests appear under their type and status.
Submitted trip requests appear under their status.
Every trip request and its status
Created events appear under their status.
Your UPI / QR pays and requests appear under their status.
To activate your corporate card we need to confirm your identity. This takes a couple of minutes: personal details, a one-time code, an ID document and a selfie.
ID card (front and back) or passport, under 5 MB.
A clear photo of your face for identity matching.
We\'ll verify your details and update your card status shortly.
Request a corporate card. You\'ll pick a card type, give a reason, and confirm. Approvals route through your manager and finance.
Why do you need this card?
I agree to the corporate card policies.
Your request (#%1$s) is now in the approval workflow.
KYC is pending for your account. We\'ve emailed you a KYC link; tap below to resend it.
Enter the monthly limit for this card.
Enter address details to ship your physical card.
Purchase requests and invoices will appear here.
Created payables documents appear under their type and status.
Record goods received against a PO
Enter a vendor invoice for matching
Log a gate entry or exit event
Your request has been sent to the procurement team for review. You\'ll be notified once it\'s approved.
Denied — enable it from system settings instead.
Set by the \"%1$s\" theme — change it above
Pick any seed color with the color wheel
Material You: colors from your wallpaper
Reduce GPS polling below 15%% battery (real effect)
Tighter spike rejection radius: 40 m vs 80 m (real effect)
Record the Kalman filter estimate alongside each fix
Thin dense route points before storing the track
Record accelerometer and gyroscope samples per fix
Restore palette, language, and experimental flags to defaults
Palette, language, and experimental flags will return to defaults.
Demo build: mock data only, no network calls.
These toggles showcase architecture capabilities. They have no effect in production.
App treats this device as rooted: shows RootGuardScreen on restart
NetworkMonitor reports disconnected; data served from Room/DataStore
Require biometric auth before viewing Cards and Advance screens
Tracking service adds ±30m noise to coordinates to demo spike detection
WorkManager discards any active journey at 22:00: demo of AutoDiscardWorker
No root signals found. This device appears to be a standard environment.
QR will update to show the amount
Our support team is available Mon–Fri, 9 AM–6 PM IST.
Ticket submitted — view it in My Tickets
Bug report submitted — view it in My Tickets
No tickets yet. Submit one from Help & Support → Contact Support.
How would you like to receive this advance?
Disbursed directly, settle with expense claims later.
Spend directly on a linked corporate card, no cash handling.
Advances ≥ ₹10,000 require manager approval (1–2 business days).
No documents required for amounts below ₹25,000 (illustrative)
I hereby declare that the advance requested is for official purposes only, and I will submit proper receipts and expense claims within 7 working days of the expenditure.
I agree to the above declaration
Amount ≥ ₹10,000: under manager review. Expected decision in 1–2 business days.
Your advance requests will appear here.
This advance request could not be located.
Manage who acts on your behalf
People you\'ve authorised to act for you
Remove %1$s\'s access? This cannot be undone.
No saved places yet. Add your home or work address for quick access.
People we alert if you trigger SOS
No emergency contacts yet. Add up to 5 people to alert with SOS.
Add emergency contacts in your profile to use SOS.
Emergency: I have triggered an SOS on Mileway and may need help. This is my current trip status.
You alerted your emergency contacts via SOS.
I confirm the uploaded documents are genuine and agree to the verification terms.
This document is locked while under review or verified.
Fires mileway:// VIEW intents to exercise deep link routing.
Manage the space this app uses on your device.
Sign out %1$s? This device will need to sign in again.
Every device except this one will be signed out.
Enter your PIN to switch to %1$s
Locked — dismiss and reopen to try again
Your session has been idle a while. Just a soft check-in — no need to sign in again.
The running trip for the previous persona was paused and saved. Switch back to that persona any time to resume it.
No root signals detected. This device appears to be running in a standard, secure environment.
This device appears to be rooted or running in an insecure environment. The app may not function correctly.
Applies to the current journey only
Fill out the details given below
You can save a draft after Step 1. Start and end odometer readings are required before continuing to Step 2.
You can save a draft after Step 1. Odometer details can be completed later.
Try a different place, area or category
Type at least 2 characters, or pick a saved place above
Add locations as per your travelled journey.
Start adding locations to create your itinerary
Tip: use the arrows to reorder stops
Add teammates linked to this journey
Review the filled details before you submit this mileage expense.
Your mileage expense has been submitted successfully.
Start a new log miles journey to save a draft
Submitted log miles will appear here
We calculated your journey distance. You can keep it or adjust if needed.
Your claimed distance exceeds the daily reimbursable limit. The amount below has been adjusted to what\'s payable under policy.
Enter the odometer reading (in km) and attach a photo of the odometer.
What would you like to do?
What type of expense is this?
This row needs attention before submitting
You have an unsaved expense for \"%1$s\"
You have an unsaved expense in progress
This amount requires manager approval before reimbursement.
This expense requires manager approval before reimbursement.
Your expense records will appear here.
Corporate-card spend awaiting reconciliation appears here.
Submitted vouchers will appear under their status.
This draft voucher (%1$s) will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
Continues tracking during temporary GPS outages
Experimental features may affect battery and accuracy.
Identifies and fills gaps in location signal
Reduces GPS noise by predicting position trajectory
Uses accelerometer to validate GPS readings
Select a nearby location to record
Your geo and manual check-ins will appear here.
Try a different search or time range.
Choose a format for the %1$d visible events:
What\'s the reason for this check-in?
Marker filters not available in demo
Direction marker uses GPS bearing and compass data for accurate heading with sub-degree precision when available.
Gyroscope sensors detect device tilt and orientation, helping identify if your phone is mounted or handheld.
Keep your phone active for accurate tracking. Background tracking is enabled, but some devices may require additional optimization settings.
Location permission is needed to track your mileage.
Notification permission is needed for background tracking.
Automatically center map on current location while tracking
Show real-time gyroscope data and device tilt
Show if device is mounted or handheld
To stop tracking, use the back button or notification controls.
Tracking gap: distance may be under-reported
This journey has no recorded location fixes.
Raw GPS coordinates for this trip
Tap \'Start Journey\' to record your first trip
Submit mileage from your journeys to see them here
Pauses when speed < 2 km/h for 3+ minutes
Sync tracking data when app is in background
All set! You\'re ready to track.
Configure the app for accurate tracking
Review journey details and required fields before submitting.
Fill out the details given below
Submit a journey first to include it in a voucher.
Your voucher has been saved locally.
All tracking data for this journey will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
This ends the active trip and finalizes the distance recorded so far.
Are you sure you want to discard this journey setup? Your odometer readings will be removed.
Are you sure you want to discard this journey? All tracking data will be lost.
Remove points recorded when tracking was paused
Comma-separated values, suitable for Excel and data analysis
Excel spreadsheet with summary and per-point sheets, opens in Excel/Sheets/Numbers
Geographic JSON format, widely supported by mapping libraries
Standard GPS format, compatible with most mapping and fitness apps
JavaScript Object Notation, ideal for technical analysis and APIs
Keyhole Markup Language, for Google Earth and Google Maps
Export only manually marked checkpoint locations
You can save this journey as a draft when you stop.
Enable this to save your journey when you stop.
Grant the permissions needed to track
Choose your vehicle and (if required) capture start odometer
e.g., Stopped for a client meeting on the way
Why are you pausing? This helps track time more accurately.
Return to fix the violation first
Continue drafts, resubmit discarded, or copy server tokens
e.g., Break over, Back on route
Switch to All to see your history
Large Discrepancy Detected: values differ by %1$s
A journey is still in progress for a different persona than the one signed in now.
Once submitted, this journey will be processed for expense reimbursement
Do you wish to submit your track miles journey for expense submission?
Your tracking data will be automatically synced when you submit. Ensure you have a stable internet connection.
Store progress now and finish later.
Locked — sign out and back in to try again
This area is illustrative in the demo. Mileage, expenses, and profile are fully functional.
Mileway records trips fully offline on your device. It needs a couple of permissions to do that:
Choose a 4-digit PIN to protect this app
Choose which persona you\'re signing in as.
Find trips, expenses, payments, bookings and more across the app.
Nothing matched \"%1$s\". Try a different term or scope.
A new version of Mileway is available with the latest improvements.
A newer version of Mileway is required to continue. Please update to keep tracking.
Mileway is briefly unavailable or this version is no longer supported. Please update or check back soon.
Remarks are required for this action
The typed, device-OCR and AI readings disagree. Accept the best guess or retake the photo.
The same remarks will be applied to all selected items.
All profile information is up to date
This removes them from the library only: the original file is unchanged.
Attachments you capture will appear here.
Camera permission is required to capture a photo.
Align odometer digits within the frame
Looks similar to a previous entry (%1$s): %2$s
We couldn\'t confidently read this as a receipt. Continue anyway or retake the photo.
How much have I spent on travel?

plurals.name: tracking_plural_interrupted_journeys
plurals.item: %1$d interrupted journey found on this device
%1$d interrupted journeys found on this device

resources.string: Applies this persona\'s plugin mix to the current account.
%1$d change(s) need a restart to apply
Tap 7 times to reveal experimental plugins
Enterprise expense identity — MFA, delegation, club, campaigns.
Consumer super-app — phone OTP, referrals, wallets, ecometer.
Gig identity — verification, garage, rates, plans, tours.
Sign in with a phone number and OTP instead of email
Offer a "Get OTP via call" fallback on the OTP screen
Code expired — resend a new one
Too many attempts — resend a new code
Require an OTP after sign-in, before the app opens
This number is already registered. Continue as one of these, or create a new account.
A few details to get you started
Show a details form after a new persona\'s first login
Allow signup without a last name
Require date of birth at signup
Show a referral-code field on the signup form
Show a Skip button on the signup form
Let users change their phone with OTP re-verify
Show verify-email status and a mock verify link
Save home, work and other addresses for quick reuse
Manage the contacts alerted by SOS
Show the emergency SOS action while tracking
Show the membership join flow and benefits
Unlock member-only perks — faster reimbursements, exclusive offers and bonus rewards on every trip.
Faster reimbursements and a dedicated support queue.
Extra reward credits on every tracked trip.
Try new features before everyone else.
By joining you agree to the Mileway Club terms. Membership is free and you can leave at any time.
Show subscription plans and the active-subscription screen
Pick the plan that fits you
This is a demo — no real payment is taken.
You don\'t have an active subscription.
This extends your subscription by one more period.
You\'ll keep access until the end of the current period.
Show earned trip milestones and compliments on your profile
Show your aggregate rating on the profile badges section
Milestones you\'ve earned from your trips
Show the searchable FAQ in the Support hub
Show My Tickets in the Support hub
Show the in-app assistant chat in the Support hub
Show the call-support action in the Support hub
Show the email-support action in the Support hub
Support channels are turned off for this profile.
Automated replies. For anything else, raise a ticket.
Hi! I\'m the Mileway assistant. Ask me about tracking, expenses, permissions or your account.
Hello! How can I help you today?
For tracking: open the Track tab and tap Start Journey. Keep Location set to Fine with background access on for the best accuracy.
To claim an expense, open a completed journey and tap Submit, then fill in the submission form and submit your claim.
For account help, open Profile → tap your name to switch accounts, or Settings for password and preferences.
Mileway needs Location (Fine + Background) for tracking, and Notifications on Android 13+. Turn off Battery Optimisation for reliable tracking.
I can\'t reach a human here, but you can raise a ticket from Support → My tickets, or use Call/Email support.
You\'re welcome! Anything else I can help with?
I\'m not sure about that yet. Try asking about tracking, expenses, permissions or your account — or raise a ticket.
Ask for a rating on Home once you\'re an engaged user
Tap a star to rate your experience.
Show target-based incentive programs and progress
Request permanent deletion of this profile
Deleting your account removes this profile\'s data from the device and signs you out.
Your account is scheduled for deletion. You can still cancel before it starts processing.
Wiping this profile and signing you out…
Full referral hub — ledger, leaderboard and activity
No referrals yet — share your code to get started.
Show the coupons screen and apply-code entry
This code has already been used.
Show earned scratch cards and the reveal interaction
No rewards yet — refer friends to earn scratch cards.
Show the marketing hub and repo-backed home banner
Show CO₂ and fuel saved from your trips vs driving a car
Show a tabbed offers hub over your coupons and campaigns
Show a one-shot best-offer popup on Home entry
Your savings vs driving a petrol car
Track a trip to see your impact.
No campaigns right now — check back soon.
Thanks — we\'ll reach out to you.
Verify a company email with an OTP for a corporate badge
Use a recognised company email domain.
Show the card KYC verification wizard
We sent a verification link to your email.
Let managers operate the app as one of their reportees
Operate the app as one of your reportees
You will need to verify again to relink this wallet.
Show bank payout details and an editable UPI handle
Fixes worse than this accuracy are logged but excluded from cleaned distance
Floor for how often a location fix is requested
Smaller moves than this are treated as GPS jitter, not distance
Speeds below this are classified as walking for jitter gating
Speeds below this (and above walking) are classified as cycling
Below this speed the device is treated as parked for micro-jitter suppression
Average recent speed above this counts as sustained movement
Minimum step (m) counted as distance while walking
Minimum step (m) counted as distance while cycling
Minimum step (m) counted as distance while driving
Wander smaller than this while parked is dropped as jitter
Number of recent fixes averaged for the movement-history check
A jump larger than this within one sample is a teleport spike
Beyond a 6 h gap, a jump larger than this is flagged abnormal
Sampling gaps shorter than this use the normal spike rules
Upper bound for the first relaxed gap-recovery tier
Upper bound for the second relaxed gap-recovery tier
Upper bound for the third relaxed gap-recovery tier
Relaxed plausible-speed cap for short gaps
Relaxed plausible-speed cap for medium gaps
Relaxed plausible-speed cap for long gaps
Ease location polling when the battery runs low
Reduce recomposition and animation load on weaker devices
Tighten spike rejection for noisier environments
Record the Kalman filter estimate alongside each fix
Thin dense route points before storing the track
Record accelerometer and gyroscope samples per fix
Use raw GPS instead of the fused provider
Sync tracked trips while the app is in the background
Pause tracking automatically when you stop moving
Let the user draw and save a digital signature in Personal Details
Include staged location points when syncing tracked trips
Include start/stop/pause trip events when syncing
Also upload diagnostic events (larger payload, off by default)
Select the V2 sync protocol (no effect offline — parity only)
How often trips auto-sync when a connection is available
Let managers see their reportees\' trips and mileage summaries
Show a draggable bubble over other apps while a trip is tracking
Master switch for the on-screen tracking overlay and bubble
Resolve place names via a simulated remote lookup instead of the local table
Apply per-km reimbursement rates by vehicle type and show trip amounts
Manage multiple vehicles, an active vehicle, and per-vehicle documents
Allow more than one vehicle in the garage instead of a single vehicle
Let drivers run a photo self-inspection checklist for each vehicle in the garage
Pick a destination and auto-classify trips toward it, with a live countdown
Pin completed trips as named favourite routes with a quick-start classification
Pick where you\'re heading — trips are classified toward it
Add a saved place first to head home
Validate your position against a nearby check-in location
Record your current position as a check-in point
No GPS fix yet. Start tracking to get a location.
By starting this journey you confirm the trip details are accurate and consent to location tracking for the duration of the journey.
Bookings > ₹10,000 require pre-approval. Submit via the Approvals tab.
Interactive coach-mark walkthrough of tracking a trip
A quick walkthrough of tracking a trip. Follow the highlighted steps.
Tap Start when you set off. Mileway tracks distance and time in the background.
Your distance and duration update live as you drive.
Taking a break? Pause keeps your trip intact and resumes on tap.
Tap Stop when you arrive to end tracking.
Mark the trip as business or personal so it lands in the right report.
Send the trip for reimbursement. That\'s the whole loop.
Tour complete — you\'ve earned the Tour complete badge. Happy tracking!
See how to track, classify and submit a trip.
Show a custom message banner at the top of every screen
Show a banner when verification documents need attention
Days before renewal to start showing the expiry banner
Scheduled maintenance tonight, 11pm–1am. Some features may be briefly unavailable.
A new version of Mileway is ready to install.
Your account-deletion request is being processed.
Unlock member perks on every trip.
See the latest coupons and campaigns.
We\'ve updated the terms. Please re-sign to continue using Mileway.
